subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the light of guidance! Though opportunity eludes me, yet am I engaged in thy remembrance with joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بنور هدی هر چند مرا مجال مفقود با وجود این بذکر تو مشغول شدم تا وجد و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
